name: Agent Task
about: Define a task for an AI agent (prompt, skill, or automation)
title: "[AGENT] "

---

## Agent Task Summary
Provide a clear and concise description of the task the agent needs to perform.

---

## Objective
What is the goal of this agent task?

- Transform / generate / analyze / validate (choose one or more)
- Expected outcome of the agent

---

## Task Details
Describe the exact behavior expected from the agent:

- Input format:
- Output format:
- Constraints:
- Edge cases:

---

## Implementation Requirements
- [ ] Define system prompt
- [ ] Ensure deterministic output (if required)
- [ ] Handle edge cases
- [ ] Maintain consistency across inputs

---
